report.summary: Built 2 learn guides: Tempo Blockchain & Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) guide covering Stripe/Paradigm's new payments L1 and AI agent payment infrastructure, and SEC Digital Commodities Classification guide covering the March 17 joint interpretation naming 16 crypto assets as digital commodities with the 5-category token taxonomy.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Tempo Blockchain launched mainnet March 18, 2026 — Stripe/Paradigm-backed L1 for stablecoin payments, $500M Series A at $5B valuation, sub-second finality, fees under $0.001

Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) co-authored by Stripe and Tempo — introduces 'sessions' (OAuth for money), Shared Payment Tokens, 100+ service integrations, partners include Visa, Mastercard, OpenAI, Anthropic
x402 vs MPP represents two philosophies: protocol minimization (Coinbase/x402) vs system maximization (Stripe/MPP) for AI agent payments
SEC-CFTC joint interpretation (March 17, 2026) — 68-page binding document classifying crypto into 5 categories, naming 16 assets as digital commodities
Five-category token taxonomy: Digital Commodities, Digital Collectibles, Digital Tools, Stablecoins, Digital Securities
16 named digital commodities: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA, LINK, AVAX, DOT, XLM, HBAR, LTC, DOGE, SHIB, XTZ, BCH, APT, ALGO
Staking (all 4 models), mining, and no-consideration airdrops clarified as NOT securities transactions
CLARITY Act still pending in Congress — interpretation is binding but not law

sections.title: Content Created
items: Tempo Blockchain & MPP Guide (~3,400 words, 468 lines): covers Tempo architecture, MPP sessions/SPTs, x402 vs MPP comparison, step-by-step MPP flow, use cases, risks, and implications for crypto users

SEC Digital Commodities Classification Guide (~3,200 words, 597 lines): covers the joint interpretation, 5-category taxonomy, all 16 named assets, definition of digital commodity, impact on staking/airdrops/ETFs, portfolio implications, and regulatory caveats

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Tempo page: title 'Tempo Blockchain & MPP Guide 2026: Stripe's Machine Payments Protocol | degen0x', target keywords: tempo blockchain, machine payments protocol, MPP crypto, stripe tempo. Article + FAQ schemas (6 FAQs). Internal links to x402 guide, stablecoin guide, AI agents guide, ecosystem pages.

SEC page: title 'SEC Digital Commodities List 2026: All 16 Crypto Assets Classified | degen0x', target keywords: SEC digital commodities, crypto commodity vs security, token taxonomy 2026. Article + FAQ schemas (6 FAQs). Internal links to SEC-CFTC MOU guide, Clarity Act guide, crypto tax guide, portfolio tracker.
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
Both pages include OpenGraph article metadata with publishedTime, Twitter cards, and proper breadcrumb navigation
